# Prompts Folder

This folder contains prompt templates for code generation and automation workflows in this project.

## Active Prompts

- create-getx-controller.prompt.md — For GetX Controller (state management) generation
- create-feature.prompt.md — For feature scaffolding
- create-feature-e2e.prompt.md — For end-to-end feature scaffolding
- create-model.prompt.md — For model (DTO) generation
- create-repo.prompt.md — For repository generation
- create-screen-from-figma.prompt.md — For generating screens from Figma designs
- refactor-screen.prompt.md — For refactoring screens to project standards
- security-review.prompt.md — For security and quality audits
- write-tests.prompt.md — For generating tests

## Deprecated/Not Used

- create-bloc.prompt.md — Bloc is not used in this project (use GetX instead)
